Scenario: Verify that example.com page loads successfully
Precondition: User has internet connection and a browser
Expected Result: Page loads without errors and displays content

Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com\n2. Check page body for text "Example Domains"
Expected Result: Page body contains the text "Example Domains"

Scenario: Verify page contains text "This domain is for use in documentation examples without needing permission. Avoid use in operations."
Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com\n2. Check page body for the informational text
Expected Result: Page body contains the exact informational paragraph text

Scenario: Verify page contains a link with text "Learn more"
Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com\n2. Locate link element with text "Learn more"
Expected Result: A link with text "Learn more" is present on the page

Scenario: Verify the "Learn more" link is clickable
Precondition: Page is loaded successfully and link is present
Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com\n2. Click on "Learn more" link
Expected Result: The link is clickable and navigates to https://www.iana.org/help/example-domains

Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com\n2. Check the page title

Scenario: Negative: Verify behavior when no internet connection
Precondition: No internet connection on the machine
Expected Result: Page fails to load with appropriate error message (DNS error / timeout)

Scenario: Negative: Verify behavior with invalid URL
Expected Result: Page returns a 404 or appropriate error page

Scenario: Edge: Verify page responsiveness at different viewport sizes
Steps:
1. Set viewport to 320x568 (mobile)
2. Navigate to https://example.com
3. Verify content is visible and not truncated
4. Set viewport to 768x1024 (tablet)
5. Verify content adjusts
6. Set viewport to 1920x1080 (desktop)
7. Verify content displays correctly
Expected Result: Page content is visible and properly formatted at all viewport sizes

Scenario: Edge: Verify "Learn more" link opens in correct tab/window
Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com\n2. Check if link has target=_blank attribute\n3. Click link if needed
Expected Result: Link navigates to https://www.iana.org/help/example-domains in the same or new tab

Scenario: Edge: Verify page load time P2
Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com\n2. Measure page load time using performance API

Scenario: Accessibility: Verify page is keyboard navigable
Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com\n2. Tab through all interactive elements\n3. Verify focus indicators are visible
Expected Result: All links are reachable via keyboard and focus indicators are visible

Scenario: Accessibility: Verify page has proper heading structure
Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com\n2. Inspect heading hierarchy (h1
Status: Page has a clear heading structure with one h1 and appropriate sub-headings

Scenario: Regression: Verify existing functionality still works after any changes
Steps: 1. Run all above test cases\n2. Compare results with baseline
Expected Result: All test cases pass with same results as previous run

Scenario: Boundary: Verify page content with very slow network (3G throttling)
Steps: 1. Enable network throttling (Slow 3G)\n2. Navigate to https://example.com\n3. Verify content eventually loads
Expected Result: Page loads completely even on slow network connections
